chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-4192 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Hearing 1. For hearing of CMA No.17257/2025 2. For hearing of main case 06.02.2026. Mr. Saleem ul Haq, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Masroor Ali, Advocate for KW&SC. --------------- The grievance of the Petitioner is that the bills issued in relation to his property by the KW &SC is wrongly categorize the same as to admeasure 1000 square yard whereas it is only 296 square yards. He submits that the bills are also not being issued in his name, albeit that he is the owner of the premises. Learned counsel for the KW & SC submits that if an appropriate application is made before the Corporation by the Petitioner enclosing relevant documents to substantiate his assertions, the same would be attended to by the competent authority and disposed of through a speaking Order after hearing the Petitioner within a period of 30 days. Learned counsel for the Petitioner is satisfied and submits that the Petitioner would do the needful. The Petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
